bathroom:
goesIn(X, bathroom) :- hasRole(X, furnitureRole), affordsTask(X, hygieneTask).
goesIn(X, bathroom) :- hasRole(X, beddingRole), affordsTask(X, sleepingTask).
goesIn(X, bathroom) :- hasRole(X, cleaningToolRole), affordsTask(X, hygieneTask).
goesIn(X, bathroom) :- hasRole(X, toolRole), affordsTask(X, maintenanceTask).
goesIn(X, bathroom) :- hasRole(X, clothingRole), affordsTask(X, dressingTask).
